description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to run npm install and caches the node_modules/ directory per job with key $CI_JOB_NAME and untracked files. Define three test jobs named test:node16, test:node18, and test:node20, each running in the default test stage, using the Docker images node:6, node:8, and node:10 respectively. Each job executes the shared script that runs npm run lint followed by npm test. No additional artifacts or rules are defined.
